Card Text: Deal 6 damage.
Upgraded Text: Deal 9 damage.
Notes: Starting card. Remove when possible.

Card Text: Gain 5 Block.
Upgraded Text: Gain 8 Block.
Notes: Starting card. Remove when possible.

Card Text: Gain 2 Stars.
Upgraded Text: Gain 3 Stars.
Notes: Starting card. Worse star generation. Better options exist.

Card Text: Costs 2 Stars. Deal 7 damage. Apply 1 Weak.
Upgraded Text: Costs 2 Stars. Deal 7 damage. Apply 2 Weak.
Notes: Starting card. 0 energy 7 damage with Weak. Actually good starter.

Card Text: Gain block equal to Stars spent. Mental Fortress for stars.
Upgraded Text: Gain block equal to Stars spent +3.
Notes: BEST CARD IN CLASS. Mental Fortress but for stars. 3 stars spent = 9 block. Click every time.

Card Text: Gain 2 energy. Draw 2 cards. Forge 12. Exhaust.
Upgraded Text: Gain 3 energy. Draw 2 cards. Forge 12. Exhaust.
Notes: Adrenaline tier. 0-cost energy + draw + Carnage in hand. Goes infinite with exhaust removal event.

Card Text: First two cards each turn cost 0 energy and 0 stars. End your turn.
Upgraded Text: First two cards each turn cost 0 energy and 0 stars. End your turn.
Notes: Echo Form for costs. Cheats energy AND stars. Play this = win fight. End turn clause rarely matters.

Card Text: Gain 2 Stars. Draw 2 cards.
Upgraded Text: Gain 3 Stars. Draw 2 cards.
Notes: BEST COMMON. Basically Coolheaded for Regent. Stars + draw. Loopable. Core of every deck.

Card Text: Next turn gain 1 energy and 1 star. Retain your hand.
Upgraded Text: Next turn gain 1 energy and 2 stars. Retain your hand.
Notes: Runic Pyramid on a card. Retain hand = line up combos. Main infinite enabler. Disgusting.

Card Text: Costs 5 Stars. Deal 33 damage. Apply 3 Weak and 3 Vulnerable. Increase damage by 11 per play.
Upgraded Text: Costs 5 Stars. Deal 44 damage. Apply 3 Weak and 3 Vulnerable. Increase damage by 11 per play.
Notes: Best star payoff. 0 energy, 33 damage + Shockwave. Scales to 66, 99+ damage. Boss killer.

Card Text: Costs 3 Stars. Gain block equal to attack damage. Deal that damage back.
Upgraded Text: Costs 3 Stars. Gain block equal to attack damage +3. Deal that damage back.
Notes: Insane output. 17 block turn 1 + deals damage back. AoE fights = deals AoE damage. Gross.

Card Text: Transform any number of cards in hand into Minion Sacrifice. Exhaust.
Upgraded Text: Transform any number of cards in hand into Minion Sacrifice. Exhaust.
Notes: Targeted Fiend Fire. Exhaust bad cards, keep good ones. Minion Sacrifice = 0 energy 9 block. Setup + block same turn.

Card Text: Next turn, seek 2 cards from draw pile.
Upgraded Text: Next turn, seek 3 cards from draw pile.
Notes: Seek delayed. Find combo pieces. Doesn't exhaust so chain it. Consistency engine.

Card Text: Costs 2 Stars. Gain 9 block. Return this to hand.
Upgraded Text: Costs 2 Stars. Gain 12 block. Return this to hand.
Notes: Premium block. Repeatable. With Hidden Cache = infinite block. Great with Convergence retain.

Card Text: Costs 3 Stars. Deal 13 damage. Apply 2 Weak and 2 Vulnerable.
Upgraded Text: Costs 3 Stars. Deal 18 damage. Apply 2 Weak and 2 Vulnerable.
Notes: Loop payoff. 0 energy damage + debuffs. Cheaper than Comet but less damage. Very solid.

Card Text: Next turn, gain 4 Stars.
Upgraded Text: Next turn, gain 5 Stars.
Notes: Best star generation. 4 stars = pay for expensive cards. Bridges into Comet/Gamma Blast.

Card Text: Deal 9 damage. Gain 2 Stars. Put this on top of draw pile.
Upgraded Text: Deal 12 damage. Gain 2 Stars. Put this on top of draw pile.
Notes: Draw this every turn. Permanent star engine. Minus one draw but stars every turn. Enables payoffs.

Card Text: Costs 2 Stars. Deal 10 damage. Draw 2 cards.
Upgraded Text: Costs 2 Stars. Deal 13 damage. Draw 2 cards.
Notes: BUFFED in patch 0.101! Draw is NOW not next turn. Much better tempo.

Card Text: At end of turn, if you played 2+ cards, gain 2 Stars.
Upgraded Text: At end of turn, if you played 2+ cards, gain 3 Stars.
Notes: Free stars every turn. Lets you play expensive payoffs. Good scaling.

Card Text: At end of turn, deal 18 damage to a random enemy.
Upgraded Text: At end of turn, deal 24 damage to a random enemy.
Notes: One card boss solve. Pay 3 upfront, then 18/turn forever. Block while it kills. Early game = S tier.

Card Text: Deal 30 damage. Gain 5 Stars.
Upgraded Text: Deal 38 damage. Gain 5 Stars.
Notes: 30 damage kills most things. Gain stars to combo with Following Star/Cloak. Great early.

Card Text: Deal 4 damage. Transform a card in hand into Minion Dive Bomb.
Upgraded Text: Deal 5 damage. Transform a card in hand into Minion Dive Bomb.
Notes: Targeted exhaust + creates Dive Bomb (13 damage). Status card converter. Colorless build synergy.

Card Text: Costs 5 Stars. Gain 9 Stars. Exhaust.
Upgraded Text: Costs 5 Stars. Gain 9 Stars. Retain. Exhaust.
Notes: Net +4 stars for free. Upgrade gives Retain. Lines up big plays.

Card Text: Gain 7 block. Next turn, gain 1 star.
Upgraded Text: Gain 10 block. Next turn, gain 2 stars.
Notes: Charge Battery but stars. Good block common. Stars are bonus.

Card Text: Gain 11 block next turn. Gain 4 block now.
Upgraded Text: Gain 14 block next turn. Gain 6 block now.
Notes: Good numbers. 15 total block for 1 energy. Helps survive setup turns.

Card Text: Deal 8 damage. Gain 1 Star.
Upgraded Text: Deal 11 damage. Gain 2 Stars.
Notes: Damage common that generates stars. Gather Light but damage. Fine early.

Card Text: Costs 3 Stars. Gain 8 block.
Upgraded Text: Costs 3 Stars. Gain 11 block.
Notes: 0 energy block. Use after Knockout Blow. Frontload block while saving energy.

Card Text: Deal 10 damage. Put a card from hand on top of draw pile.
Upgraded Text: Deal 13 damage. Draw 2 cards.
Notes: Damage + draw manipulation. Upgrade is Pommel Strike. Solid common.

Card Text: Costs 3 Stars. Deal 8 damage to ALL enemies.
Upgraded Text: Costs 3 Stars. Deal 10 damage to ALL enemies.
Notes: AoE matters in STS2. 0 energy AoE. Good early hallway clear.

Card Text: Gain 5 block. Put a card from hand on top of draw pile.
Upgraded Text: Gain 7 block. Put a card from hand on top of draw pile.
Notes: Headbutt for block. Line up star gen with star payoff. Decent utility.

Card Text: Deal 13 damage. Forge 5.
Upgraded Text: Deal 16 damage. Forge 5.
Notes: Forge is bad but 2 for 13 is okay rate. Not infinite-able but fine early.

Card Text: Exhaust 2 cards from draw pile. Add 2 Minion Strikes to hand next turn.
Upgraded Text: Exhaust 3 cards from draw pile. Add 3 Minion Strikes to hand next turn.
Notes: Targeted exhaust from draw pile. Minion Strikes = 0 cost 7 damage draw 1. Thins deck.

Card Text: Deal 7 damage to ALL enemies. All enemies lose 1 Strength.
Upgraded Text: Deal 8 damage to ALL enemies. All enemies lose 2 Strength.
Notes: AoE + Strength reduction. Good Act 1 common. Multi-hit enemies hate this.

Card Text: Deal 15 damage. Next turn, gain 1 energy.
Upgraded Text: Deal 18 damage. Next turn, gain 2 energy.
Notes: Energy cheat. 15 damage is okay. Clunky but does something.

Card Text: Deal 9 damage. Add Debris to hand.
Upgraded Text: Deal 12 damage. Add Debris to hand.
Notes: Debris = status you pay 1 to exhaust. Essentially 1 for 9 if you exhaust debris. Meh.

Card Text: Deal 3 damage to ALL enemies per Star gained this turn.
Upgraded Text: Deal 4 damage to ALL enemies per Star gained this turn.
Notes: 0-cost AoE nuke. Hidden Cache turn = 12+ AoE. Turn 1 with Divine Right = 9 AoE free. Great with Royally Approved enchant.

Card Text: Deal 13 damage. Costs 3 Stars. Card costs reduced by 1.
Upgraded Text: Deal 16 damage. Costs 3 Stars. Card costs reduced by 1.
Notes: 1 energy + 3 stars for 13 and cost reduction. Awkward. Too expensive for what it does.

Card Text: Costs 4 Stars. Deal 30 damage.
Upgraded Text: Costs 4 Stars. Deal 36 damage.
Notes: 4 stars is awkward (start with 3). Need to draw star gen first. Big number but clunky.

Card Text: Costs 3 Stars. Ethereal. Deal 9 damage to ALL. All enemies lose 9 Strength.
Upgraded Text: Costs 3 Stars. Ethereal. Deal 9 damage to ALL. All enemies lose 9 Strength.
Notes: Block card disguised as attack. -9 Str = huge. Ethereal means it leaves. Rare slot hurts.

Card Text: Costs 7 Stars. Deal 7 damage to ALL enemies 7 times.
Upgraded Text: Costs 1. Deal 7 damage to ALL enemies 7 times.
Notes: 49 AoE damage if you can pay. 7 stars is HARD to get. Upgrade makes it easier. Field wipe if it works.

Card Text: Costs 6 Stars. Draw 3 cards. Choose a Skill, play it 3 times.
Upgraded Text: Costs 6 Stars. Draw 3 cards. Choose a Skill, play it 3 times.
Notes: 6 stars is very hard. Triple Glow = 9 stars + draw 6. Niche.

Card Text: Deal 24 damage. Cost reduced by 1 each time drawn.
Upgraded Text: Deal 28 damage. Cost reduced by 1 each time drawn.
Notes: 4 energy is brutal. Scales as drawn but slow. Top-deck manipulation makes it better.

Card Text: Deal 12 damage. Deals +3 damage per play this combat.
Upgraded Text: Deal 15 damage. Deals +3 damage per play this combat.
Notes: Worse rampage. Slow scaling. 2 energy hurts. Don't pick.

Card Text: At end of turn, Forge 4.
Upgraded Text: At end of turn, Forge 6.
Notes: Forge archetype. Slow. One card boss solve but takes forever.

Card Text: Forge 10.
Upgraded Text: Forge 15.
Notes: Forge 10 for 1 energy. Blade package is bad. Skip.

Card Text: Deal 7 damage. Forge 5.
Upgraded Text: Deal 10 damage. Forge 5.
Notes: Early damage + slow scaling. Rampage that does something turn 1. Not good enough.

Card Text: Forge 3. Next turn gain 1 energy.
Upgraded Text: Forge 5. Next turn gain 1 energy.
Notes: Forge 3 is nothing. Energy next turn is clunky. Bad.

Card Text: Deal 5 damage. Forge 5 additional for each hit this turn.
Upgraded Text: Deal 7 damage. Forge 7 additional for each hit this turn.
Notes: Needs multi-hit setup. Target specific. Rare card doing common things. Skip.

Card Text: Forge 8. Put Sovereign Blade in hand from anywhere.
Upgraded Text: Forge 11. Put Sovereign Blade in hand from anywhere.
Notes: Core of Blade builds. Forge + draw Blade. Lets you play Blade multiple times per combat.

Card Text: Increase Sovereign Blade cost by 1. It hits an additional time.
Upgraded Text: Increase Sovereign Blade cost by 1. It hits an additional time.
Notes: Blade costs MORE?! 3 energy blade is unplayable. Avoid.

Card Text: Forge 30.
Upgraded Text: Forge 40.
Notes: Need stars + 2 energy + blade draw. If skill potion gives this, great. Otherwise skip.

Card Text: Add 2 random colorless cards to hand. They cost 0 this turn.
Upgraded Text: Add 3 random colorless cards to hand. They cost 0 this turn.
Notes: Random colorless often bad. Still pay their cost next turn if not played.

Card Text: Whenever you spend or gain Stars, deal 3 damage to ALL enemies.
Upgraded Text: Whenever you spend or gain Stars, deal 4 damage to ALL enemies.
Notes: Slow chip damage. Doesn't scale with star count, just instances. Desperation AoE pick.

Card Text: Gain 6 Vigor.
Upgraded Text: Gain 9 Vigor.
Notes: Multi-hit synergy. No multi-hit package. Skip.

Card Text: At start of turn, add 1 random colorless card to hand.
Upgraded Text: At start of turn, add 1 random colorless card to hand.
Notes: 2 energy is expensive. BUT feeds Supermassive/Arsenal/Pillar of Creation. Colorless build only.

Card Text: At start of turn, draw 1 card and exhaust 1 card randomly.
Upgraded Text: At start of turn, draw 1 card and exhaust 1 card randomly.
Notes: Random exhaust can hit your good cards. Card creation synergy but unreliable.

Card Text: At end of turn, gain 1 energy.
Upgraded Text: At end of turn, gain 2 energy.
Notes: 2 energy for 1 energy/turn. Bad energy relic. Stars are the limiting factor, not energy.

Card Text: Costs 2 Stars. Gain 1 Strength. All enemies lose 1 Strength.
Upgraded Text: Costs 2 Stars. Gain 2 Strength. All enemies lose 2 Strength.
Notes: Strength doesn't matter when looping 33 damage Comets. Skip.

Card Text: Attacks reduce enemy Strength by 1. Cards give you 1 Strength this turn.
Upgraded Text: Attacks reduce enemy Strength by 1. Cards give you 2 Strength this turn.
Notes: 3 energy! Does almost nothing. Horrible.

Card Text: Sovereign Blade deals double damage this turn.
Upgraded Text: Costs 1. Sovereign Blade deals double damage this turn.
Notes: Blade costs 2 + this costs 2 = 4 energy for one attack. No.

Card Text: Add 3 random Regent cards to hand.
Upgraded Text: Add 4 random Regent cards to hand.
Notes: Random cards you still have to pay for. Doesn't cheat costs. Terrible.

Card Text: Deal 4 damage per Skill played this turn.
Upgraded Text: Deal 6 damage per Skill played this turn.
Notes: Inconsistent. Often bricks. Better things to do with skills.

Card Text: Deal 6 damage. Every 3 Skills, returns to hand.
Upgraded Text: Deal 8 damage. Every 3 Skills, returns to hand.
Notes: Flurry of Blows but worse. Doesn't help combos. Skip.

Card Text: Deal 5 damage. +3 per card created this combat.
Upgraded Text: Deal 5 damage. +4 per card created this combat.
Notes: Card creation build core. Transform cards = created. GUARDS/BEGONE synergy. Pick early for colorless build.

Card Text: Whenever you create a card, gain 3 block.
Upgraded Text: Whenever you create a card, gain 4 block.
Notes: Card creation synergy. GUARDS = instant 15+ block. Crash Landing = panic button. Colorless build key.

Card Text: Deal 17 damage. Copy a colorless card in hand.
Upgraded Text: Deal 20 damage. Copy a colorless card in hand.
Notes: What colorless are you copying? 2 for 17 is bad. Skip.

Card Text: Deal 7 damage X times.
Upgraded Text: Deal 10 damage X times.
Notes: X-cost with no energy gen. Need Chem X. Ultra niche.

Card Text: Draw 6 cards.
Upgraded Text: Costs 1. Draw 6 cards.
Notes: 2 energy draw 6 but then what? No energy left. Upgrade makes it playable.

Card Text: Gain 9 block. If on top of draw pile, play this.
Upgraded Text: Gain 12 block. If on top of draw pile, play this.
Notes: Top-deck manipulation needed. Too niche.

Card Text: Deal 6 damage 3 times.
Upgraded Text: Deal 8 damage 3 times.
Notes: 18 damage for 2 energy. Gets much better with Strength or Vigor. Decent Act 1 vs multi-hit vulnerable enemies like Vantom.

Card Text: Apply 1 Weak. Apply 1 Vulnerable. Exhaust.
Upgraded Text: Apply 1 Weak. Apply 1 Vulnerable.
Notes: Free debuffs but exhausts. Upgrade removes exhaust. Following Star already gives Weak + damage.

Card Text: Deal 5 damage to random enemy X times.
Upgraded Text: Deal 7 damage to random enemy X times.
Notes: X = Stars spent? Star-scaling damage. Multi-hit synergizes with Vigor/Strength.

Card Text: Costs 3 Stars. Gain 2 energy.
Upgraded Text: Costs 3 Stars. Gain 3 energy.
Notes: Trade stars for energy. Explosive turns. Pairs with Hidden Cache for huge energy swing.

Card Text: Whenever you create a card, gain 1 Strength.
Upgraded Text: Whenever you create a card, gain 2 Strength.
Notes: BUFFED in patch 0.101! Now triggers on card CREATION (not colorless). Works with GUARDS/BEGONE/transforms.

Card Text: Deal 5 damage. Forge 5. Forges +5 for each hit this turn.
Upgraded Text: Deal 7 damage. Forge 7. Forges +7 for each hit this turn.
Notes: Forge scaling with multi-hit. Celestial Might + this = lots of Forge. Still Forge package is weak.

Card Text: Deal 21 damage to ALL enemies. Fill hand with Debris.
Upgraded Text: Deal 26 damage to ALL enemies. Fill hand with Debris.
Notes: Big AoE but Debris clogs hand. Use to finish fights only. Worse than Crash Lightning.

Card Text: Choose 1 of 3 random Colorless cards to add to hand.
Upgraded Text: Choose 1 of 3 random UPGRADED Colorless cards to add to hand.
Notes: 0-cost card discovery. Feeds Supermassive/Arsenal. Can find Apotheosis or good colorless.

Card Text: Forge 7. Sovereign Blade now deals damage to ALL enemies.
Upgraded Text: Forge 11. Sovereign Blade now deals damage to ALL enemies.
Notes: Makes Blade an AoE finisher. Key for Blade builds. Forge 7 is decent bonus.

Card Text: Whenever you play a card, gain 1 Star.
Upgraded Text: Innate. Whenever you play a card, gain 1 Star.
Notes: ANCIENT ONLY. Broken star gen. Every card = 1 star. Slam pick for any Regent.
